(",["$","code",null,{"children":".prw"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":".tlpp"}],", or both). Do not ask questions yet."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Extract the following into a structured analysis (internal only — never dump raw extraction at the user):"}],"\n",["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","id":"11-domain","children":"1.1 Domain"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Routine name (e.g. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MYRTN001"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Main table(s) accessed (e.g. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"ZXX"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"ZXY"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Business description (1 sentence from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"/*/\\{Protheus.doc\\}"}]," or inferred)"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","id":"12-browse-columns","children":"1.2 Browse columns"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Look for: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"aCampos"}]," array, ",["$","code",null,{"children":"FWFormStruct"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"BeginSQL … SELECT"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"FWBrwColumn"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"GetSX3Cache"}]," calls."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["For each column record: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\\{ field, type, label, align, width \\}"}],".\nComputed/temp fields (prefix ","$L7",") are columns too — note them."]}],"\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29","\n","$L2a","\n","$L2b","\n","$L2c","\n","$L2d","\n","$L2e"]}]]}],["$L2f","$L30"],"$L31"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"Kzf2nhqAn4yPCKuLPxs51"}

24:["$","div",null,{"className":"relative overflow-auto prose-no-margin my-6","children":["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Placeholder"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Source"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\\{\\{columns\\}\\}"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Extracted column array → ",["$","code",null,{"children":"po-table-column[]"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\\{\\{actions\\}\\}"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Extracted actions → ",["$","code",null,{"children":"po-page-action[]"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\\{\\{statusOptions\\}\\}"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Status map → chip filter + legend"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\\{\\{summaryCards\\}\\}"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Totals panels → summary strip component"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\\{\\{drawerFields\\}\\}"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Browse fields → drawer detail block"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\\{\\{businessRules\\}\\}"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Rules → comments + validation code"}]]}]]}]]}]}]
25:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"No mock data files."}]," Never create ",["$","code",null,{"children":"*.mock.ts"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"*.data.ts"}],", or separate mock files.\nIf the app needs demo data for local development (no backend), add a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"const DEMO_*: Model[] = [...]"}]," at the top of the component file and load it only in the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"error"}]," handler of ",["$","code",null,{"children":"carregar()"}],". This keeps the component self-contained and production-clean."]}]
26:["$","hr",null,{}]
27:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","id":"step-5--verify-angularjson","children":"Step 5 — Verify angular.json"}]

2e:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Never show the raw extraction to the user — only the formatted plan."}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Never run visual companion (browser/screenshots) during this flow.
